name: Community 1St
description_short: Community First Credit Union of Florida offers checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards to members. A member-owned financial cooperative with local branch access and online banking.
description_long: Community First Credit Union of Florida is a member-owned financial institution operating under the credit union model, which prioritizes member service over shareholder profit. Based on their website, they serve Florida residents and members with a full suite of retail banking products and financial services delivered through physical branches, ATMs, and digital channels. The institution offers traditional banking products including checking and savings accounts, mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and credit cards. They advertise competitive mortgage rates with no closing costs, a Visa Signature credit card with 1.5% unlimited cash back, and checking accounts with signup bonuses ($200 cash offer mentioned). They also provide financial wellness education through their moveUP program targeting students, adults, and entrepreneurs, along with financial literacy resources on topics like auto loan reduction and mortgage affordability. As a credit union, Community First differentiates itself by being member-owned rather than shareholder-owned, emphasizing local decision-making and personalized service. Their website explicitly contrasts credit unions versus banks and highlights their employment culture as part of the member experience. They maintain a physical branch network with ATM access and promote their routing number and online banking capabilities prominently. Based on available website information, Community First appears to be a legitimate, established credit union with standard banking operations. The information available is primarily marketing-focused rather than comprehensive product detail.
services: Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinance
Visa Signature credit cards with cash back rewards
Financial planning tools (mortgage calculator, auto loan analysis)
Business lending and funding for entrepreneurs
Bill payment and check writing services
pros: Member-owned credit union structure means profits theoretically benefit members rather than external shareholders
No closing costs advertised on mortgage loans, a meaningful cost reduction versus traditional mortgages
Unlimited 1.5% cash back on all purchases with Visa Signature credit card—competitive rate for a standard rewards card
$200 cash bonus for opening new checking account, lowering switching costs
Free moveUP Financial Wellness Program offering financial education for students, adults, and entrepreneurs
Local branch and ATM network providing in-person service and cash access
Wide product range including mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and credit cards under one institution
cons: Website content does not disclose membership requirements, eligibility criteria, or whether membership is restricted geographically or by employer
No APR, interest rate, or fee information provided on the website—rates and terms cannot be compared to competitors
Limited detail on loan products beyond mortgages; auto loan terms, personal loan amounts, and approval criteria not specified
No information about minimum balances, monthly fees, or maintenance charges for checking/savings accounts
Website lacks third-party ratings, customer reviews, or independent verification of service quality or complaint resolution
best_for: Florida residents seeking full-service banking with local branch access and member-owned structure
Homebuyers interested in mortgages advertised as having no closing costs
Credit card users wanting unlimited flat-rate cash back rewards on all spending
Individuals seeking free financial literacy education through structured wellness programs
diagnosis: Community First Credit Union of Florida is best suited for Florida members seeking comprehensive, locally-accessible banking with a member-owned structure and competitive promotional offers on mortgages and credit cards. The primary caveat is that detailed product terms, rates, fees, and membership eligibility requirements are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact with the credit union for accurate comparison and application.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Community First Credit Union of Florida offers checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards with local branches and online banking.
